name: semantic-pr-rebase-at-scale
description: Rebase 50-100 open PRs against main after systemic CI fix, using parallel Sonnet sub-agents in worktree isolation with semantic conflict resolution. Use when: (1) a CI infrastructure fix lands on main breaking all open PRs, (2) need to batch-rebase 50+ PRs with conflict resolution, (3) conflicts require reading issue context to resolve semantically rather than blindly picking ours/theirs.
